category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a CLI for Apache Pulsar written in Go; official GitHub README calls it a CLI tool for Apache Pulsar.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pulsarctl; official GitHub repository is streamnative/pulsarctl.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains install, build, and usage documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/streamnative/pulsarctl, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Apache Pulsar CLI; official README documents pulsarctl commands and Go-based installation/building.
